And then four and five are fulfillment and then retention for the interview. I want to be very clear. I like to get people speed of money as fast as possible. And so you'll see that these trainings are concise for that reshifted my view of trainings in general. Most people make these trainings to try and cover their asses and make as much stuff as humanly possible, which makes it impossible for people to actually consume it. I try to do the opposite and make things as short as possible. Now the 10 minute calls, you add them up, is 50 minutes. So about another hour, all right? So we're three hours in right now. So that's gonna be a 60 minute call where you're gonna dive much deeper and actually close them. And so obviously those calls are about three hours. Those three 60 minute calls on a $2,000 package, which could be like a 16 week program for $400 a month. Okay, make about $2,000 for 10 hours of work, which is $200 an hour. So if you're making more than $200 an hour right now, then don't do this. If you are making less than 10 hours to get one of those sales.
